summary:
See 'man ecasound-iam' and the Audio::Ecasound Perl CPAN module.
Version 0.3 now seems to be working reliably.
raw_content:
See 'man ecasound-iam' and the Audio::Ecasound Perl CPAN module.
Version 0.3 now seems to be working reliably.
generated_summary: ecasound is a library for processing audio complete usually used in the fields of audio.
phase1: A library for audio processing and manipulation in Lua, utilizing the Ecasound audio processing framework
phase2: Supports various audio file formats, including WAV, AIFF, and OGG, with real-time processing capabilities
phase3: Used for audio synthesis, mixing, and effects processing, enabling complex audio compositions and real-time audio analysis
